nasb.text: He will send from heaven and save me; He reproaches him who tramples upon me. Selah. God will send forth His lovingkindness and His truth.

esv.text: He will send from heaven and save me; he will put to shame him who tramples on me. Selah God will send out his steadfast love and his faithfulness!

cnv.text: 神從天上施恩拯救我， 斥責那踐踏我的人； 　神必向我發出他的慈愛和信實。

ccb.text: 上帝从天上施助、拯救我， 使迫害我的人蒙羞。 上帝必彰显祂的慈爱和信实。

csbs.text: 他从天上赐下救恩拯救我， 他斥责那践踏我的人。细拉 神赐下了他的慈爱和信实。
